title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 25 April 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 25 April 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 25 April 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 26/04/2025
The ship recycling market continued to remain under pressure, with no region showing signs of recovery. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-04-26_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-19-April-25-April-2025_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2025-04-26_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-19-April-25-April-2025_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
19 April - 25 April 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The ship recycling market continued to remain under pressure, with no region showing signs of recovery. In India, the brief optimism following policy
interventions has faded, and local activity remains slow.
